 {"id":"bd-3qss","title":"[CAP] E2E: usage -> suggestion flow","description":"# [CAP] E2E: usage -> suggestion flow

## Goal
End-to-end script validating usage telemetry and recommendations.

## Script
- `e2e/capability_usage_flow.sh` with structured JSON logs.
- Steps:
  1) Invoke connector operations to generate usage events.
  2) Run `fcp capabilities report` and `suggest`.
  3) Verify unused capabilities are flagged.

## Logging
- Emit JSON per step: {stage, connector_id, result, suggestions_count, duration_ms}.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Suggestions match observed usage.
- Logs are deterministic and redacted.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:08:01.649005705Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:29:56.434029877Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3qss","depends_on_id":"bd-1rso","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:08:36.933248897Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3qss","depends_on_id":"bd-2ctr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:08:39.942271329Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3qss","depends_on_id":"bd-3iac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:08:01.661807725Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3r6p","title":"[TRACE] Replay engine + CLI","description":"# [TRACE] Replay engine + CLI

## Goal
Replay traces deterministically for debugging and regression analysis.

## Deliverables
- Replay engine that feeds captured frames into MeshNode.
- CLI: `fcp trace replay <file>` with summary report.
- Diff output for expected vs actual decisions.

## Tests
- Determinism tests (same trace -> same decisions).
- Snapshot tests for replay reports.
- Structured JSON logs for replay steps.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Replay reproduces allow/deny/routing decisions for captured trace.
- CLI output is deterministic and machine-parseable.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:05:44.468397897Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:28:05.510044519Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3r6p","depends_on_id":"bd-21fq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:06:29.931282856Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3r6p","depends_on_id":"bd-3tja","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:05:44.482231340Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3r6p","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1n78.22","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:06:32.864287123Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3rgx","title":"[SC] Host verification pipeline + policy gate","description":"# [SC] Host verification pipeline + policy gate

## Goal
Verify attestation + SBOM before connector install/upgrade and enforce policy gates in fcp-host with deterministic evidence bundles.

## Deliverables
- Verification pipeline steps:
  - Parse manifest + binary digest.
  - Verify attestation signatures and bind to artifact digest.
  - Verify SBOM signature and hash match.
  - Enforce policy (require_attestation, min_slsa_level, trusted_builders, rekor_required, allow_unsigned).
  - Produce evidence bundle (verification steps, hashes, trust roots, timestamps).
- Policy config surface in host (zone or global).
- Evidence bundle stored as mesh object (deterministic, redacted).

## Design Notes
- Fail closed by default; allow_unsigned must be explicit and scoped to dev.
- Verification must be deterministic (ordering, canonical encoding, stable hashes).
- Redact secrets and opaque tokens in logs/evidence.
- Cache verified artifacts for offline installs; cache keyed by digest.

## Tests
- Unit tests for each verification rule and error code mapping.
- Integration tests with test connectors + signed/unsigned fixtures.
- Property tests for determinism (same inputs -> same bundle hash).
- Structured JSON logging for each verification step.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Missing/invalid attestations block install unless policy allows.
- Evidence bundle is deterministic, audit-ready, and redacted.
- Clear, actionable error codes for each failure case.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:59:10.158698768Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:23:07.348613172Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3rgx","depends_on_id":"bd-33no","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:59:10.172243177Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3rgx","depends_on_id":"bd-3myr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:59:54.115632652Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3rgx","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-oip0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T02:59:57.094006460Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-3tja","title":"Mesh Trace Capture + Replay Debugger","description":"# Mesh Trace Capture + Replay Debugger

## Goal
Enable deterministic capture and replay of mesh traffic for debugging and incident analysis.

## Why
- Reproduce complex mesh failures offline.
- Provide evidence bundles for audits and regressions.
- Improve developer velocity for hard-to-debug issues.

## Scope
- Trace format with redaction policy.
- Capture hooks in MeshNode (routing/admission/leases).
- Replay engine + CLI with deterministic playback.

## Non-goals
- Full production tracing UI; CLI only for now.

## Deliverables
- Trace schema + canonical encoding rules.
- Redaction policy (PII, secrets, tokens).
- MeshNode capture with sampling and size caps.
- Replay engine + `fcp trace replay` CLI.
- Unit/integration tests + E2E script with structured logs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Captures can be replayed to reproduce routing/admission decisions.
- Sensitive fields are redacted or encrypted.
- Deterministic outputs for identical traces.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:05:06.943101048Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:27:10.227068504Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","fcp2","mesh"]}
+{"id":"bd-3tja","title":"Mesh Trace Capture + Replay Debugger","description":"# Mesh Trace Capture + Replay Debugger

- Sensitive fields are redacted or encrypted.
- Deterministic outputs for identical traces.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"WildGrove","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:05:06.943101048Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T01:01:41.447701890Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","fcp2","mesh"]}
 {"id":"bd-3u58","title":"[IDEA-04.3] CursorStore example integration (polling connector)","description":"## Goal
Provide example wiring in a polling-style connector (Telegram/Gmail-like) to demonstrate correct CursorStore usage.

## Details
- Add a reference example in testkit or a minimal connector harness.
- Demonstrate lease acquisition, cursor load, commit, and snapshot.

## Tests
- Integration test that restarts the connector and verifies no duplicate processing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Example shows the full lifecycle and is copy/paste ready.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:50.973236146Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T21:45:16.531649250Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T21:45:16.531552220Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3u58","depends_on_id":"bd-2cqj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:50.982849848Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3vu7","title":"[IDEA-09.1] fcp manifest fix: command implementation","description":"## Goal
Implement `fcp manifest fix` command in CLI.

## Details
- Parse manifest TOML, recompute interface hash.
- Support `--check` and `--write`.
- Output JSON summary (changes, lint results).

## Tests
- Unit tests for CLI arg parsing and output format.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Command works on existing manifest files without running connector.","status":"blocked","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:36:43.938220352Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T02:26:53.931828226Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3vu7","depends_on_id":"bd-1wqu","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:36:43.947047964Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3zhv","title":"[IDEA-01.4] SDK runtime kit: tests + reference examples","description":"## Goal
Provide reference examples and comprehensive tests for the runtime kit.

## Details
- Add a minimal streaming example (fake gateway) and polling example (fake API) in testkit.
- Add golden-log snapshots for health transitions (dependent on bd-11g2 schema).
- Document usage patterns in `docs/STUDY_Clawdbot_Connector_Patterns.md` and/or SDK README.

## Tests
- Unit + integration tests for both supervisors.
- Validate logging against JSONL schema (once available).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Examples compile and can be used as copy/paste templates by connector authors.
- Tests cover common failure modes (timeouts, 429, disconnect, resume).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.561879044Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:32:13.520423475Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T18:32:13.520352523Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-11g2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:28:34.508761764Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-2zy9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.571210031Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":17,"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation Complete - Created supervisor_examples.rs in fcp-testkit with:

1. FakePollingApi - configurable mock API with error injection (timeout, rate limit, auth failed, network error)
2. FakePollingConnector - reference connector using PollingSupervisor
3. FakeStreamingSession - reference session implementing StreamingSession trait
4. FakeUpdate / FakeStreamEvent - example event types

Added 8 tests covering API success, error injection, rate limiting, fatal errors, and connector shutdown/failure modes.

Also fixed pre-existing test failures in policy_simulation.rs (missing requires_posture and posture_attestation fields).

All 36 fcp-testkit tests pass.","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:31:51Z"}]}
